英國英格蘭肯特瓦爾梅
zh.Ashburnham, Sussex, England: 英國素可阿申波恩哈姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Criol於大約1150年出生在英國素可阿申波恩哈姆時，他的父親Bertram de Criol34歲，母親Emma Crevequer23歲。他和Margery de Spelmonden至少有4個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1227年之前，埋葬在英國英格蘭肯特森特。

英国英格兰肯特瓦爾梅
zh-hans.Ashburnham, Sussex, England: 英国素可阿申波恩哈姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John de Criol于大约1150年出生在英国素可阿申波恩哈姆时，他的父亲Bertram de Criol34岁，母亲Emma Crevequer23岁。他和Margery de Spelmonden至少有4个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1227年之前，埋葬在英国英格兰肯特森特。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Criol
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Altered form of German   Krill   or   Grill  . This surname is also found in the Channel Islands.
English and Scottish: metathesized form of   Curl  .

variants.name: Krill
meanings: nickname for a lively, cheerful person, from Low German krill ‘lively, healthy’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When John de Criol was born about 1150, in Ashburnham, Sussex, England, his father, Bertram de Criol, was 34 and his mother, Emma Crevequer, was 23. He had at least 4 sons and 1 daughter with Margery de Spelmonden. He died before 1227, and was buried in Thanet, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Criol est né environ 1150, à Ashburnham, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, Bertram de Criol, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Emma Crevequer, avait 23 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille avec Margery de Spelmonden. Il est décédé avant 1227, et a été enterré à Thanet, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John de Criol um 1150 in Ashburnham, Sussex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Bertram de Criol 34 und seine Mutter Emma Crevequer 23. Er hatte mit Margery de Spelmonden mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb vor 1227 und wurde in Thanet, Kent, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John de Criol è nato il circa 1150 nel Ashburnham, Sussex, England, il suo padre, Bertram de Criol, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Emma Crevequer, aveva 23 anni. Lui avuto almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia con Margery de Spelmonden. Morì prima del 1227, e fu sepolto a Thanet, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.Ashburnham, Sussex, England: イギリススセックスアシュブルンハム
ja.lifeSummary: John de Criolが約1150年にイギリススセックスアシュブルンハムで生まれた時，父Bertram de Criolは34歳，母Emma Crevequerは23歳であった。彼はMargery de Spelmondenとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1227年以前に死去し，イギリスイギリスケントサンエットにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John de Criol(이)가 대략 1150년 영국 수세스 애쉬번함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Bertram de Criol(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Emma Crevequer(은)는 23세였다. 그는 Margery de Spelmonden(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1227년 이전 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 스아닛에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John de Criol nasceu aproximadamente 1150, em Ashburnham, Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Bertram de Criol, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Emma Crevequer, tinha 23 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha com Margery de Spelmonden. Ele faleceu antes 1227, e foi sepultado em Thanet, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Criol родился около 1150 г. в местности ашбурнам, суссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Bertram de Criol было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Emma Crevequer, 23. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь от Margery de Spelmonden. Он умер перед 1227 г. и был похоронен в местности танет, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John de Criol nació aproximadamente 1150, en Ashburnham, Sussex, Inglaterra, su papá, Bertram de Criol, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Emma Crevequer, tenía 23 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija con Margery de Spelmonden. Murió antes de 1227, y fue sepultado en Thanet, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
